text: Every judge of a court not of record shall keep a full record of every case in which a person is charged with any violation of this code.

# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 1. The Department of Motor Vehicles [1500 - 1825]
#### Article 3. Records of Department [1800 - 1825]
##### § 1802

Every judge of a court not of record shall keep a full record of every case in which a person is charged with any violation of this code.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Every judge of a court not of record shall keep a full record of every case in which a person is charged with any violation of this code.
